text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the holidays approach, we're finishing our
usual training when I tell Curren Chan I want to
show her something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a little late, but I've bought her a present for
getting first place in the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Reservations for Visee Noir's limited holiday
dinner course?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's totally amazing! This restaurant is super
famous!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's all over Umastagram every winter.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's so hard to get reservations here! How did you
manage this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spent a long time researching trends on
Umastagram and then used Director Akikawa's
connections to get the reservations.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...You really thought hard about this for me.
Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...You really thought hard about this for me.
Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan seems happy. The reservation is for
multiple people, so I thought she could bring her
roommate, Admire Vega, or some other friends.
choice_data_list: Go have fun with your friends.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...My friends?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Not you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Not you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm not going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's unusual for Curren Chan to refuse something
so vehemently...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And don't get me wrong, I'm really grateful.
Thank you for being so thoughtful and doing
something like this for me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But... this isn't what would make me happiest.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Deep down, you know that, don't you? Don't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And here I thought adults were supposed to be smart.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And here I thought adults were supposed to be smart.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...In any case, I can't accept this gift. Not now,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
They don't expire for a while, so wait until I'm
more of a smart adult too, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Instead...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to celebrate the holidays a few days
later. When the day comes...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro! This way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! This way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: They're selling seasonal cakes over there!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I really want one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Curren Chan's request, we walk through the
town decorated with lights. But...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Why wouldn't it be? We're celebrating the holidays with a date! I think this is more than enough of a present.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Although, I suppose it's okay that you keep
thinking of this as just another hangout.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Although, I suppose it's okay that you keep
thinking of this as just another hangout.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna be a kid for a little bit longer anyway.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Soooo!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't treat me too much like an adult yet. I still
want you to spoil me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Curren Chan spends the rest of the night
making me spoil her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What a beautiful view! Don't you think so?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our normal training, Curren Chan asks me to
walk up a hill with her to see the nighttime
cityscape.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...The view at night really gets you thinking.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There's someone on the other end of every single
one of those lights...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And some of them don't even know who I am yet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop until all of the lights in the world shine
with cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what "shine with cuteness" means...
but even on the holidays, she's thinking about her
goals.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... I've got a long way to go before that. I
mean, I'm still pushing you around all the time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... I've got a long way to go before that. I
mean, I'm still pushing you around all the time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Like... with the holiday reservations you gave me.
Sorry for rejecting them.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You put a lot of thought into that gift, and I was
really happy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But... I still think you messed up on the details.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You mean you're not mad?
choice_data_list:
I feel kind of privileged that you can push me
around.

I feel kind of privileged that you can push me
around.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I really do have a long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You made my heart skip a beat for a second
there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You made my heart skip a beat for a second
there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna master cuteness and become an even
more wonderful me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think that's good for this year. I love all
the time I get to spend talking to you. But, you
know...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think that's good for this year. I love all
the time I get to spend talking to you. But, you
know...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm the kind of girl who gets whatever she wants,
right? So next year...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make you say you wanna spend the
holidays with me too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Pft.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe. Just you wait. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe. Just you wait. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stay put a little while longer, looking at the
stars and talking endlessly to each other.
